<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Empagliflozin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Type 2 diabetes mellitus Jardiance is indicated in adults and children aged 10 years and above for the treatment of insufficiently controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus as an adjunct to diet and...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.0%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.0%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（98.5%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（98.4%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（98.3%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（98.2%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（98.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
